drilldown.attendanceTitle: Athletes who may need a nudge
drilldown.attendanceBody: One calm watchlist for falling attendance, repeat absences, and quiet check-ins.
drilldown.trainingGroupsBody: A quick grouped view of where session energy is dipping.
drilldown.trainingCoachBody: See who is carrying the heaviest recent training rhythm.

trainingPulse.title: Attendance is easier to read now.
trainingPulse.subtitle: A {{recentDays}}-day view for managers who want to spot quiet drop-offs, engaged trial athletes, and sessions that still need follow-through.
trainingPulse.watchlistHint: Built from recent decline, repeat absences, or {{followUpDays}}+ days without a present check-in.
trainingPulse.trialMomentumHint: Trial athletes with {{recentDays}}-day attendance holding at {{threshold}}% or better.
trainingPulse.followUpHint: Athletes without a recent present check-in for {{days}}+ days.
trainingPulse.attendancePendingHint: Finished sessions that still need attendance recorded.
trainingPulse.upcomingAttentionHint: Planned sessions in the next two days that still need a coach or location check.
trainingPulse.watchlistTitle: Who may need a gentle follow-up?
trainingPulse.watchlistBody: This short list keeps the story human: attendance softening, not enough recent check-ins, or repeated absences.
trainingPulse.watchlistMeta: {{group}} · {{rate}}% recent attendance · {{delta}} pts vs. the previous window
trainingPulse.groupSnapshotBody: Grouped summaries keep the focus on which cohorts need a little extra attention, not on chart noise.
trainingPulse.coachSnapshotBody: A small workload check helps you see concentration before the week feels lopsided.
trainingPulse.coachSnapshotEmpty: Coach load will appear as soon as recent sessions are in view.

training.attendanceFlowBody: Unmarked athletes stay clearly visible until you choose a status, so the session is easy to review before saving.
training.unmarkedAttendanceHint_one: {{count}} athlete still needs a status before this list is fully reviewed.
training.unmarkedAttendanceHint_other: {{count}} athletes still need a status before this list is fully reviewed.
training.attendanceReadyHint: Every visible athlete has a status. Save when the session looks right.

reports.subtitle: Operational visibility for attendance, training rhythm, and club follow-up.
reports.readyHint: These report surfaces now help staff move from attendance signal to next action without feeling like a BI tool.

scheduling.body: See attendance follow-up, coach load, and groups that may need steadier training rhythm.

launch.attendanceStarterBody: Start with the warmest attendance story: who may need a nudge, which trial athletes are engaged, and where a coach might want to look closer.

attendancePulse.title: The club's training rhythm in one calm view.
attendancePulse.subtitle: Signals stay explainable: a {{recentDays}}-day attendance watchlist, trial momentum, quiet check-ins, and the sessions or groups that need follow-through.
attendancePulse.watchlistHint: A short, operator-friendly list of athletes whose recent pattern says 'check in soon.'
attendancePulse.watchlistMeta: {{groupName}} · {{rate}}% recent attendance · {{delta}} pts vs. the previous window
attendancePulse.watchlistEmpty: No athletes are standing out for follow-up right now.
attendancePulse.watchlistEmptyHint: As attendance patterns diverge, this watchlist will keep the strongest follow-up stories near the top.
attendancePulse.groupSnapshotTitle: Groups that may need steadier rhythm
attendancePulse.groupSnapshotHint: Grouped attendance gives managers a fast sense of where a cohort may need help, without opening a dense report first.
attendancePulse.groupSnapshotEmpty: Group attendance summaries will appear once attendance is recorded across more sessions.
attendancePulse.groupSnapshotEmptyHint: Record a few sessions and this grouped view becomes a quick management scan.
attendancePulse.coachSnapshotHint: Use session load as a gentle balancing signal, not a scorecard.
attendancePulse.coachSnapshotEmpty: Coach load will appear when recent sessions are available.
attendancePulse.coachSnapshotEmptyHint: As soon as the recent training window fills out, this grouped snapshot helps distribute attention more evenly.

decliningAttendance.title: Athletes with falling recent attendance
decliningAttendance.description: Recent attendance has dropped compared with the previous window, with enough marked sessions to trust the signal.

trialHighEngagement.title: Trial athletes showing strong momentum
trialHighEngagement.description: Trial athletes who are showing up consistently and may be ready for a confident next step.

regularWithoutTeam.title: Regular attendees without a team
regularWithoutTeam.description: Active athletes training consistently even though they are still group-only.

recentAbsences.title: Athletes absent multiple times recently
recentAbsences.description: A simple absence-based follow-up list for coordinators and coaches.

noRecentCheckIn.title: Athletes without a recent check-in
noRecentCheckIn.description: Athletes who have gone quiet and may need a human follow-up.

attendanceWatchlist.title: Attendance watchlist
attendanceWatchlist.description: One friendly list that combines the strongest recent attendance follow-up signals.

attendancePending.title: Sessions still missing attendance
attendancePending.description: Finished sessions that still need attendance recorded before the day is really closed.

upcomingNeedsAttention.title: Upcoming sessions needing setup attention
upcomingNeedsAttention.description: Planned sessions in the near window that still need a coach or location check.

notableAbsence.title: Sessions with notable absence levels
notableAbsence.description: Sessions where absence concentration stands out enough to deserve a closer look.

lowAttendanceGroups.title: Groups with the lowest attendance rhythm
lowAttendanceGroups.description: Grouped view of which cohorts are seeing the softest attendance lately.

coachLoad.title: Coach training load
coachLoad.description: Recent session count by coach, with average roster size to help balance the work.

reportBuilder.subtitle: Build, save, and export calm operational reports across athletes, training sessions, private lessons, and finance.
reportBuilder.welcomeBody: Open a curated starter, adjust filters or grouping, then save the view or export to CSV. Attendance and training now live in the same workspace instead of a separate analytics tool.
reportBuilder.tipPickEntity: Pick what you want to look at — athletes, training sessions, guardians, private lessons, or finance.
